name: @neondeck/github-webhook-relay
description: Standalone Cloudflare Worker that relays signed GitHub webhooks to authenticated WebSocket clients.

scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run types:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run deploy:dry-run
scripts.test: cross-env GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET="It's a Secret to Everybody" WS_CLIENT_SECRET=test-client-secret-0123456789 vitest run
